# The Comprehensive List of AI Governance Tools

> a curated, source-linked directory of open-source and commercial tools for governing AI systems across risk, compliance, safety, transparency, and accountability. Includes a machine-readable catalog. CC0 licensed. Reviewed monthly; last reviewed 2026-07-16.

Every entry links to a primary source. Availability markers distinguish open source, open weights, open core, commercial products, and public standards/resources. There is no paid placement. Confident AI, DeepEval, and DeepTeam are separate entities maintained by the same team and follow the same evidence rules.

## Main content

- [Full list](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/aglio-lab/ai-governance-tools/main/README.md): 133 source-linked entries across 12 catalog sections
- [JSON catalog](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/aglio-lab/ai-governance-tools/main/data/tools.json): structured entity records
- [CSV catalog](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/aglio-lab/ai-governance-tools/main/data/tools.csv): flat machine-readable index
- [Monthly maintenance policy](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/aglio-lab/ai-governance-tools/main/MAINTENANCE.md): review schedule and evidence rules

## Key categories

- Enterprise AI Governance Platforms (13 entries)
- AI Inventory, Model Registry, and Lifecycle Governance (11 entries)
- Risk Assessment and Regulatory Compliance (11 entries)
- Audit, Assurance, and Evaluation Evidence (12 entries)
- Model Monitoring and Validation (12 entries)
- Explainability and Interpretability (10 entries)
- Fairness and Bias Assessment (8 entries)
- Privacy and Data Governance (10 entries)
- Documentation, Transparency, and Model Cards (10 entries)
- AI Security, Guardrails, and Policy Enforcement (14 entries)
- Cloud-Native AI Governance Services (14 entries)
- Discontinued and Historical Tools (8 entries)

## Citation

- [CITATION.cff](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/aglio-lab/ai-governance-tools/main/CITATION.cff)
- Cite as: “The Comprehensive List of AI Governance Tools” (2026). GitHub. https://github.com/aglio-lab/ai-governance-tools
- Cite an individual tool using its own repository, documentation, or paper.
